api/client/go.purpose: Generated Go SDK for the OpenMeter v1 REST API. client.gen.go is fully generated by oapi-codegen from api/openapi.cloud.yaml; client.go adds ergonomic wrappers and auth helpers on top of the generated client. This is a public SDK — it must remain importable without the full monorepo.

patterns.name: Never edit client.gen.go
patterns.description: client.gen.go carries 'Code generated by oapi-codegen DO NOT EDIT' header and is regenerated by 'make gen-api'. Any manual edit is overwritten on next run.
patterns.example:
// BAD: editing client.gen.go directly
// GOOD: add wrapper method to client.go instead

patterns.name: Ergonomic wrappers in client.go only
patterns.description: client.go is the only hand-written Go file. Add only methods that delegate to verbose generated method names. Do not duplicate type definitions or add business logic.

patterns.name: Auth via RequestEditorFn option
patterns.description: NewAuthClientWithResponses and NewAuthClient prepend a WithRequestEditorFn that sets Authorization: Bearer, then append caller-supplied opts. Never embed auth inside generated code.

patterns.name: Tests use httptest.NewServer mock
patterns.description: client_test.go validates each wrapper by spinning up httptest.Server, asserting on method, path, Content-Type, and comparing JSON-decoded response structs with assert.Equal.

patterns.name: Enum Valid() method for runtime validation
patterns.description: All generated enums (e.g. AddonStatus, AppType) have a Valid() bool switch covering all known constants. Use Valid() instead of manual switch statements for runtime validation.

key_file_guides.role: Fully generated SDK: all types, enums, request/response structs, and HTTP methods. Source of truth is api/openapi.cloud.yaml via codegen.yaml.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Do not edit. Regenerate with 'make gen-api'. Uses always-prefix-enum-values and disable-required-readonly-as-pointer compatibility flags — changing codegen.yaml affects all enum constant names.

key_file_guides.role: Hand-written ergonomic layer: auth constructors (NewAuthClient, NewAuthClientWithResponses) and CloudEvents ingest shorthands (IngestEvent, IngestEventBatch, IngestEventWithResponse, IngestEventBatchWithResponse). The //go:generate directive here drives regeneration of client.gen.go.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Only add methods that delegate to generated methods. Do not add type definitions or business logic here.

key_file_guides.role: oapi-codegen configuration: package 'openmeter', generates client + models + embedded-spec into client.gen.go, with always-prefix-enum-values enabled.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Changing compatibility flags affects all generated enum constant names and pointer semantics across the entire SDK. Coordinate with api/openapi.cloud.yaml changes.

key_file_guides.role: Unit tests for hand-written wrappers using mock HTTP servers. Tests are in package openmeter (white-box). Tests import openmeter/openmeter/meter for MeterAggregation type casting.
key_file_guides.watch_for: TetsListEvents (note typo) is never run by 'go test' — the function name lacks the 'T' prefix required by testing. Do not replicate this naming pattern.

key_file_guides.role: ErrResponse struct for rendering HTTP error responses: StatusCode, StatusText, AppCode, Message fields.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Separate from generated error types in client.gen.go. Ensure new error handling uses the correct type for the context — ErrResponse is for rendering, not domain errors.

anti_patterns: Editing client.gen.go manually — it is overwritten on every 'make gen-api' run
Adding new API types or request/response structs to client.go — they belong in api/spec/ TypeSpec and regenerate into client.gen.go
Embedding authentication tokens or credentials directly in client methods instead of using the ClientOption / RequestEditorFn pattern
Importing app-internal monorepo packages beyond those already referenced — this is a public SDK and must remain externally importable
Writing tests that bypass httptest.NewServer and make live HTTP calls

decisions.decision: client.gen.go is generated from api/openapi.cloud.yaml (not openapi.yaml) with always-prefix-enum-values in codegen.yaml
decisions.rationale: The cloud variant includes cloud-specific endpoints. Enum prefixing prevents collisions when multiple enums share value strings (e.g. 'active' appears in AddonStatus, AppStatus, etc.).

decisions.decision: Ergonomic wrappers in client.go rather than changing codegen.yaml templates
decisions.rationale: CloudEvents ingest has two content-types (single vs batch) producing verbose generated method names; short wrappers improve DX without forking the generator or creating a custom template.

decisions.decision: Auth injected via RequestEditorFn option chain, not embedded in generated methods
decisions.rationale: Keeps generated code immutable and allows callers to compose multiple request editors (auth + tracing + retry) without modifying the SDK source.

code_examples.scenario: Add a new ergonomic wrapper for a generated method

api/client/node.purpose: Tombstone folder documenting that the Node SDK has been superseded by the JavaScript SDK at api/client/javascript. Contains only a README redirect; no active code lives here.

key_file_guides.role: Single-file redirect pointing developers to api/client/javascript.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Do not add new files here. Any Node/TypeScript SDK work belongs in api/client/javascript.

anti_patterns: Adding new SDK code to this folder — it is deprecated in favour of api/client/javascript

api/client/web.purpose: Tombstone folder documenting that the Web SDK has been superseded by the fetch-based JavaScript SDK at api/client/javascript. Contains only a README redirect; no active code lives here.

key_file_guides.role: Single-file redirect pointing developers to api/client/javascript.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Do not add new files here. Any browser/web SDK work belongs in api/client/javascript.

anti_patterns: Adding new SDK code to this folder — it is deprecated in favour of api/client/javascript
